title: Localization Length Analysis Result
description: Schema for the final extracted localization length (xi) derived from finite-size scaling of Participation Ratios.

disorder_strength.description: The disorder width W used for this analysis.

system_sizes.description: List of system sizes L used in the finite-size scaling fit.

mean_pr_by_size.description: Map of system size L to mean Participation Ratio across realizations.

fitted_xi.description: The extracted localization length xi (in units of lattice spacing).

fit_uncertainty.description: Standard error of the fitted xi.

fit_params.description: Detailed parameters from the finite-size scaling fit (e.g., slope, intercept).

r_squared.description: Coefficient of determination for the fit.

num_realizations.description: Number of disorder realizations averaged for each system size.
